summary: Iteration 99: Testing Directed Studio Pipeline v5 - Pre-Production Intelligence. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend loads correctly, login works, Marketing AI Studio accessible. New helper functions (_analyze_avatars_with_vision, _build_production_design, _create_composite_avatar) are importable. DirectSora2Client class is available. Frontend components (StudioProductionBanner, DirectedStudio) have correct phase labels for pre_production and pre_production_done.
critical_code_review_comments: studio.py: New _analyze_avatars_with_vision function (line ~194) uses Claude Vision to analyze ALL character avatars in ONE call and produce canonical descriptions

studio.py: New _build_production_design function (line ~243) creates comprehensive Production Design Document with style_anchors, character_bible, location_bible, scene_directions, music_plan, voice_plan
studio.py: New _create_composite_avatar function (line ~309) creates side-by-side collage of ALL character avatars in a scene for Sora 2 reference
studio.py: _run_multi_scene_production updated with PRE-PRODUCTION phase (lines ~871-904) that calls avatar analysis and production design before scene direction
studio.py: Scene directors now use canonical character descriptions from production_design.character_bible instead of raw text
studio.py: Sora 2 now receives composite avatar images (collage) instead of single avatar
studio.py: Screenwriter prompt updated (SCREENWRITER_SYSTEM_PHASE1) to enforce character type (animal vs human) with explicit rules
StudioProductionBanner.jsx: Updated phase labels for pre_production (line 30-31, 41-42)
DirectedStudio.jsx: Updated phase labels for pre_production (line 1177-1178)
core/llm.py: DirectSora2Client class available for direct OpenAI Sora 2 video generation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline v5 (Pre-Production Intelligence) implemented. Key changes: (1) NEW pre-production phase with Claude Vision avatar analysis and Production Design Document generation, (2) Scene directors use canonical character descriptions from production design, (3) Sora 2 receives composite avatar images, (4) Music planning integrated into production design, (5) Screenwriter prompt enforces character type. All helper functions importable. Frontend phase labels updated. AI API calls require real API keys (Claude, Sora 2, Gemini) - cannot be tested without valid keys.

frontend_ui_tests.Landing page load: PASS - AgentZZ landing page loads correctly
frontend_ui_tests.Login flow: PASS - Login with test credentials works
frontend_ui_tests.Navigation: PASS - All nav tabs visible (Dashboard, Chat, Agentes, Marketing, CRM, Analise, Config)

code_verification.StudioProductionBanner phase labels: PASS - pre_production and pre_production_done phases handled (lines 30-31, 41-42)
code_verification.DirectedStudio phase labels: PASS - pre_production and pre_production_done phases handled (lines 1177-1178)
code_verification.Screenwriter character type enforcement: PASS - SCREENWRITER_SYSTEM_PHASE1 includes rules for animal vs human characters

pipeline_v5_verification.avatar_analysis: _analyze_avatars_with_vision uses Claude Vision for canonical character descriptions
pipeline_v5_verification.production_design: _build_production_design creates comprehensive document with style_anchors, character_bible, location_bible
pipeline_v5_verification.composite_avatars: _create_composite_avatar creates collage of all characters in scene for Sora 2
pipeline_v5_verification.scene_directors: Use pd_chars (production design character bible) for canonical descriptions
